source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT SN_CIO, 	   Server_WFGUID, 	   App_WFGUID, 	   COUNT(COMBID) INSTANCES, 	   ResponsibleParty, 	   [STATUS], 	   a.FeedType, 	   FirstDetected, 	   ConsequenceModelEscalationDate, 	   DueDate, 	   APPResponsibleDate, 	   TargetVersion, 	   ValidatedDate,                       Rating, solutionstatus,                        Title,                       SolutionGroup  	    	       FROM [cooiTracker2].[dbo].[vSORFeedsPrimary] (NOLOCK) a   where CAST(validateddate AS DATE) BETWEEN cast(getdate()-395  as date ) AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) or validateddate is null       GROUP BY  	   SN_CIO, 	   Server_WFGUID, 	   App_WFGUID, 	   ResponsibleParty, 	   [STATUS], 	   a.FeedType, 	   FirstDetected, 	   ConsequenceModelEscalationDate, 	   DueDate, 	   APPResponsibleDate, 	   TargetVersion, 	   ValidatedDate,                       Rating,solutionstatus,Title,                       SolutionGroup

SELECT TOP (12) REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(SOLUTIONGROUP,'MW CONFIG - ',''),'APP PRODUCTS PATCH - ',''),'DB CONFIG - ',''), 'QUALYS PATH ' ,''),'MW EOL - ',''),'MW PATCHING - ',''),'DB EOL - ',''),'APP PRODUCTS EOL - ','') SOLUTIONGROUP, SUM(INSTANCES) TOTALINSTANCES ,GETDATE() AS import_date FROM [PLHS].[DBO].[VW_WFT_TCOO_ITRACKER_METRICS_TOPCOUNTS_LASTMONTH] WHERE RESPONSIBLEPARTY IN ('APPLICATION TEAM','ASSIGNED PRODUCT/PLATFORM') AND FEEDTYPE ='QUALYS' GROUP BY SOLUTIONGROUP ORDER BY TOTALINSTANCES DESC ) , CTE2 AS ( SELECT TOP (12) REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.SOLUTIONGROUP,'MW CONFIG - ',''),'APP PRODUCTS PATCH - ',''),'DB CONFIG - ',''), 'QUALYS PATH ' ,''),'MW EOL - ',''),'MW PATCHING - ',''),'DB EOL - ',''),'APP PRODUCTS EOL - ','') SOLUTIONGROUP, SUM(INSTANCES) TOTALINSTANCES FROM [PLHS].[DBO].[VW_WFT_TCOO_ITRACKER_METRICS_TOPCOUNTS_LASTMONTH] A WHERE RESPONSIBLEPARTY IN ('APPLICATION TEAM','ASSIGNED PRODUCT/PLATFORM') AND FEEDTYPE !='QUALYS' GROUP BY SOLUTIONGROUP ORDER BY TOTALINSTANCES DESC ) SELECT *, 'QUALYS' SOURCESYSTEM FROM CTE1 UNION ALL SELECT *, 'NON-QUALYS' SOURCESYSTEM FROM CTE2
